title: Tigray, in northern Ethiopia, is facing the threat of another war
subhead: The Ethiopian government has assembled troops on the border of its northern region amid a surge of tensions that has been not seen since the end of the war in 2022, a conflict that claimed 600,000 lives over two years.

title: Rekindled love: 'Something had happened and it split me in two. I had never experienced that before'
subhead: They met, fell in love and then parted ways. Life's twists and turns eventually brought them back together. Sylvain, 53, shares his story with Laurence, who is also 53.

title: Four years of war in Ukraine: Five photographers on assignment for Le Monde share their most striking images from 2025
subhead: Five photographers who covered the conflict in 2025 have each chosen an emblematic image of the conflict. Beyond the official figures and statements, these unique perspectives reveal the mark that this new year of war has left on them.

subhead: A book published to mark the 110th anniversary of the legendary battle brings to light many images taken by army photographers. Le Monde is presenting several of these photographs, offering a glimpse into the reality behind this symbol of the First World War.

title: Dark Bank: American suspected of leading an international criminal organization extradited to France
subhead: Huzefa Hafiz Ismail arrived on French soil on Friday. He was arrested in August 2024 in Texas at the request of French judicial authorities, who suspect him of leading a vast money laundering network.
